mapper.select:
SELECT m.id, m.merchant_name, m.logo, m.description, m.business_hours, m.min_delivery_amount, m.delivery_fee, m.status, m.longitude, m.latitude, IFNULL(os.sales_volume, 0) AS salesVolume, IFNULL(orv.rating, 0) AS rating
, ROUND( 6371 * 2 * ASIN( SQRT( POW(SIN((#{query.latitude} - m.latitude) * PI() / 180 / 2), 2) + COS(#{query.latitude} * PI() / 180) * COS(m.latitude * PI() / 180) * POW(SIN((#{query.longitude} - m.longitude) * PI() / 180 / 2), 2) ) ), 2 ) AS distance
FROM merchant m LEFT JOIN ( SELECT merchant_id, COUNT(*) AS sales_volume FROM orders WHERE status = 5 AND pay_status = 1 GROUP BY merchant_id ) os ON os.merchant_id = m.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT merchant_id, ROUND(AVG(rating), 1) AS rating FROM order_review GROUP BY merchant_id ) orv ON orv.merchant_id = m.id WHERE m.audit_status = 1 AND m.status IN (1, 2)
AND m.merchant_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.name}, '%')
AND m.biz_category_id = #{query.categoryId}
ORDER BY distance ASC, m.create_time DESC
ORDER BY salesVolume DESC, m.create_time DESC
ORDER BY rating DESC, salesVolume DESC, m.create_time DESC
ORDER BY m.min_delivery_amount ASC, m.create_time DESC
ORDER BY m.delivery_fee ASC, m.create_time DESC
ORDER BY m.status ASC, distance ASC, salesVolume DESC, rating DESC, m.create_time DESC
ORDER BY m.status ASC, salesVolume DESC, rating DESC, m.create_time DESC
SELECT id, merchant_name, logo, description, business_hours, min_delivery_amount, delivery_fee, status, longitude, latitude FROM merchant WHERE id = #{merchantId} AND audit_status = 1
